name: Juneyao Airlines Co., Ltd
summary: Juneyao Airlines Co., Ltd operates domestic passenger, cargo, and mail air transportation services in China. The company also offers business and tourist charter services, as well as flights to Hong Kong, Macao, and neighboring countries. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Shanghai, China. Juneyao Airlines Co., Ltd operates as a subsidiary company of Shanghai Juneyao Group Co.,Ltd.
